description.value:
Category: Clan
Prerequisites: Kisaragi Clan, level 16+
Description: You reach the apex of mastery over your clan's abilities. Your mind reaches a state of clarity that can only be likened to a polished mirror. You gain the following benefits:

  • You may choose one jutsu you know with the Water Release keyword and grant it the following effects;

    • Creatures that gain a rank of Chilled from this jutsu are also Stunned until the end of their turn next round. If a creature Stunned this way would take damage, they immediately take an additional 6d12 Cold damage, and end the Stunned condition.
    • Creatures that would take Cold damage from this jutsu gain 1 rank of Bleed.
    • Increase the range, or radius of this jutsu by 30 feet.

Once per full rest, as an action, you can spend 5 Heat Points to exert an aura that begins to crystallize the droplets of water in the air around you, and granting full control over them to enter a state known as Purgatory Hell. While in this state, at the start of each of your turns, you must spend 4 Chakra Die to maintain it. In this state, you gain the following effects;

  • Jutsu you cast with the Water Release or Wind Release keyword ignore resistance to Cold damage and treat immunity as resistance.
  • Creatures in a 15-foot radius centered around you, with ranks of Chilled, gain a rank of Bleed at the start of each of their turns.
  • Jutsu you cast with the Water Release or Wind Release keyword have their chakra cost reduced by 3.
  • If a creature would take Cold damage and would not already gain a rank of Chilled, they gain a rank of Chilled.
  • Once per round, if you would spend Heat Points (min. 1), you may reduce the cost to 0.
